remadeTemplate.summary: Signing authority, cheque controls, invoice approval, legal document execution, gift agreement approval, and receipt authority.

sections.heading: Authority
paragraphs: Two authorized signers are required for cheques, banking instructions, and other banking documents unless the bylaws or board resolution require a stricter rule.
Invoices must be reviewed before payment. Non-budgeted invoices above {NonBudgetedApprovalLimit} require approval by the board chair, treasurer, or another board-approved officer.

sections.heading: Legal and Fund Documents
paragraphs: Legal documents may be signed only after the board has approved the transaction or delegated authority for that class of document.
Fund agreements, deeds of gift, and comparable donor agreements require the approvals and signatures listed in the signing authority schedule.

sections.heading: Receipts
paragraphs: Donation receipts may be signed or issued by the role designated by the board, subject to the organization's receipting controls and charity registration obligations.

remadeTemplate.html:
{PolicyName}

Organization: {CorporationName}

Policy number: {PolicyNumber}

Effective date: {PolicyEffectiveDate}

This is a Societyer starter template remade from imported source material. Review it for your jurisdiction, bylaws, funder requirements, charity status, and actual operations before adoption.

Authority

Two authorized signers are required for cheques, banking instructions, and other banking documents unless the bylaws or board resolution require a stricter rule.

Invoices must be reviewed before payment. Non-budgeted invoices above {NonBudgetedApprovalLimit} require approval by the board chair, treasurer, or another board-approved officer.

Legal and Fund Documents

Legal documents may be signed only after the board has approved the transaction or delegated authority for that class of document.

Fund agreements, deeds of gift, and comparable donor agreements require the approvals and signatures listed in the signing authority schedule.

Receipts

Donation receipts may be signed or issued by the role designated by the board, subject to the organization's receipting controls and charity registration obligations.

Monitoring

This policy will be reviewed on or around {ReviewDate} and whenever legal, operational, funding, or governance requirements materially change.

Board Acceptance

This policy was approved by resolution of the board of directors of {CorporationName} on {EffectiveDate}.

{#SoleVotDir}Approved by the sole voting director.{/SoleVotDir}{#MultiVotDir}Approved by counterpart signatures of the voting directors.{/MultiVotDir}

{#VotingDirectors}{SignerTag}
_________________________________________
{Director-Name}{/VotingDirectors}
